## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Sendoso (Kacie Jenkins) and GrowthX (Kyle Gaudreau, Bruno Santilli) to discuss potential AI-assisted content generation and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sendoso seeks scalable, high-quality content creation solutions without expanding budget/headcount](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content workflows with human oversight, emphasizing quality over volume](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to a follow-up demo with Marcel (GrowthX co-founder) to dive deeper into GrowthX's platform and processes](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=2123.0)

## Topics

### Sendoso's Current Marketing Challenges

  - [9-10 person marketing team (incl. 3 BDRs) responsible for all qualified pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [No dedicated internal SEO, content creation, or website management resources](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Struggling to scale content production and repurpose existing assets (e.g., webinars)](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [Managing 3 websites post-acquisition (Sendoso, Postal, Alice) with limited resources](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Differentiators

  - [Focus on editorial-quality content vs. pure volume/programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [Workflow-based system combining AI tools with human expertise at multiple stages](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Team includes industry veterans (e.g., ex-TechCrunch editor-in-chief, former Fanatics/TripAdvisor SEO lead)](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [Emphasis on end-to-end ownership: content creation, publishing, distribution, conversion optimization](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)

### AI Content Generation Concerns

  - [Kacie wary of potential SEO penalties from low-quality AI-generated content (citing Deepgram example)](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [GrowthX stresses their quality-first approach, iterative calibration process with clients](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Multiple human touchpoints in workflows to ensure relevance, accuracy, and brand alignment](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Content Strategy Opportunities for Sendoso

  - [Leverage Postal acquisition for expanded content/media opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)
  - [Explore topic areas beyond manual sales gifting (e.g., ABM, outbound marketing, AI experiences)](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=1979.0)
  - [Create comprehensive guides and repurpose social content into deeper, educational pieces](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=2010.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up demo with Marcel (GrowthX co-founder) for Friday, 9-10am PT](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=2123.0)
  - [Kacie to involve more team members in next meeting to evaluate GrowthX's platform](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=2108.0)
  - [GrowthX to showcase detailed workflow examples and address Kacie's quality/implementation concerns](https://fathom.video/share/3Vf-C-T288mpxwoSzj4_vk1r1HD4gVen?tab=summary&timestamp=2075.0)
